description: Ukraine is becoming a foundational pillar for Europe's new security architecture "The war has transformed Ukraine from a consumer of European security to a net provider of it," writes Aliona Hlivco, Founder and CEO at the St. James’s Foreign Policy Group, in her op-ed. "Discussions in Brussels increasingly focus on how Ukraine can be integrated into Europe's political and security structures...

description: 👀 After Zelensky's ultimatum, Russian drones stopped flying along the border of Belarus and Ukraine, "Flagshtok" Belarusian publication reports that since June 21, it has stopped recording flights of Russian attack UAVs along the Belarusian-Ukrainian border. The last such drone was seen in the Gomel and Brest regions on the morning of June 21. At the same time, the strikes on the Chernihiv region continue, but now the drones...

Последний такой дрон был замечен в Гомельской и Брестской областях утром 21 июня. При этом удары по Черниговской области продолжаются, однако теперь беспилотники...

title: Crimea: Airstrike attack on infrastructure

description: Update: SBU, special forces confirm strikes on Crimea airfields, Russian helium plant. Ukraine struck Russian air defense systems and military airfield infrastructure in occupied Crimea, alongside strategic industrial facilities in Russia’s Orenburg Oblast, the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) and the Special Operations Forces (SSO) announced on June 24.
description_en: Update: SBU, special forces confirm strikes on Crimea airfields, Russian helium plant. Ukraine struck Russian air defense systems and military airfield infrastructure in occupied Crimea, alongside strategic industrial facilities in Russia’s Orenburg Oblast, the Security Service of Ukraine (SBU) and the Special Operations Forces (SSO) announced on June 24.

title: Attack attack

description: The strike on the Dubna space communications center was painful as hell 😱 The General Staff writes that the strike hit the hardware-module complex of the 32-meter MARK-IV antenna, which is used for satellite communications, as well as the technical building next to it. In addition, the defeat of the main production and administrative building, where the central equipment of line communication is located, has been confirmed...
description_en: The strike on the Dubna space communications center was painful as hell 😱 The General Staff writes that the strike hit the hardware-module complex of the 32-meter MARK-IV antenna, which is used for satellite communications, as well as the technical building next to it. In addition, the defeat of the main production and administrative building, where the central equipment of line communication is located, has been confirmed...
description_uk: Удар по центру космической связи «Дубна» оказался чертовски болезненным 😱 Генштаб пишет, что ударом был поражен аппаратно-модульный комплекс 32-метровой антенны MARK-IV, которая используется для спутниковой связи, а также техническое здание рядом с ней. Кроме того, подтверждено поражение главного производственно-административного корпуса, где расположены центральная аппаратура линий связи,...

title: The SBU hit airfields and air defense systems in Crimea. The...
title_en: The SBU hit airfields and air defense systems in Crimea. The...
title_uk: СБУ завдала ударів по аеродромах і системам ППО в Криму. ...
description: The SBU hit airfields and air defense systems in Crimea. The airfields "Saki" and "Gvardeyskoe" were hit, as well as Russian air defense systems in the Kerch Strait area. According to preliminary data, four aircraft hangars, two S-400 installations and two Pantsir-S1 complexes were hit.
description_en: The SBU hit airfields and air defense systems in Crimea. The airfields "Saki" and "Gvardeyskoe" were hit, as well as Russian air defense systems in the Kerch Strait area. According to preliminary data, four aircraft hangars, two S-400 installations and two Pantsir-S1 complexes were hit.
description_uk: СБУ ударила по аэродромам и системам ПВО в Крыму Под удар попали аэродромы «Саки» и «Гвардейское», а также российские системы ПВО в районе Керченского пролива. По предварительным данным, поражены четыре ангара с авиатехникой, две установки С-400 и два комплекса «Панцирь-С1».

Працював у військових частинах, що виконують завдання із відсічі збройної агресії російської федерації на Олександрівському напрямку. title: Sevastopol: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich...
title_en: Sevastopol: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich...

description: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich Russian program. In Orenburg, a drone flew over a gas processing plant - local correspondents counted several arrivals and fires at once. Balaklavskaya TPP, which provides electricity to Sevastopol, is burning in occupied Crimea. It is also reported about fires near the "Gvardeyskoe" airfield, from where Russian aircraft launch...
description_en: "This is an interesting war": at night, drones arranged a rich Russian program. In Orenburg, a drone flew over a gas processing plant - local correspondents counted several arrivals and fires at once. Balaklavskaya TPP, which provides electricity to Sevastopol, is burning in occupied Crimea. It is also reported about fires near the "Gvardeyskoe" airfield, from where Russian aircraft launch...
description_uk: «Вот это, нахй, война интересная»: ночью дроны устроили русне насыщенную программу В Оренбурге прилетело по газоперерабатывающему заводу — местные корреспонденты насчитали сразу несколько прилетов и очагов возгорания. В оккупированном Крыму горит Балаклавская ТЭС, которая обеспечивает электричеством Севастополь. Также сообщается о пожарах возле аэродрома «Гвардейское», откуда русня запускает...

title: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...
title_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for...

description: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_en: He held a meeting with the Secretary General of the Organization for Economic Cooperation and Development Mathias Korman. Ukraine's membership in the OECD is very important for us. And today we are taking a step in this direction: the Prime Minister handed over to the OECD the official renewed application of Ukraine for membership. We hope to receive the status of a candidate country already this fall. The next stage is the road map to membership in the OECD. Discussed...
description_uk: Провів зустріч із генеральним секретарем Організації економічного співробітництва та розвитку Матіасом Корманом. Членство України в ОЕСР для нас дуже важливе. І сьогодні робимо крок в цьому напрямі: Прем’єр-міністр передала ОЕСР офіційну поновлену заявку України на членство. Сподіваємось отримати статус країни-кандидата вже цієї осені. Наступний етап – дорожня карта до членства в ОЕСР. Обговорили...

Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...

Awarded state awards to the soldiers of the Central Security Service "A" of the SBU and handed over the award to the family of the fallen Hero, who was awarded this title posthumously. The Security Service of Ukraine over the years of our full-scale protection has become...
description_uk: Сьогодні вже 32 роки Центру спеціальних операцій «Альфа» Служби безпеки України, і я вдячний вам за те, що кожного року ви додаєте сили і Центру, і Службі безпеки України, і всій нашій державі. Відзначив державними нагородами воїнів ЦСО «А» СБУ та передав нагороду родині загиблого Героя, удостоєного цього звання посмертно. description: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many discussions and questions about the Liman. In particular, we are talking about fixation of lesions in the eastern part of the city, which logically leads to the conclusion that katsaps are seeping there. Increased activity on the city continues for some time, and given the successes of the Muscovites in Kostyantynivka, Liman is becoming an increasingly relevant target. And the quantitative advantage is small...
description_en: The situation in the Liman area ℹ️ Recently, there have been many discussions and questions about the Liman. In particular, we are talking about fixation of lesions in the eastern part of the city, which logically leads to the conclusion that katsaps are seeping there. Increased activity on the city continues for some time, and given the successes of the Muscovites in Kostyantynivka, Liman is becoming an increasingly relevant target. And the quantitative advantage is small...
description_uk: Ситуація в районі Лиману ℹ️ Останнім часом багато обговорень та запитань лунає щодо Лиману. Зокрема, йдеться про фіксації уражень в східній частині міста, що логічно виводить на висновки, що кацапи туди просочуються. Підвищена активність на місто триває протягом певного часу, а враховуючи успіхи московитів на Костянтинівці, Лиман стає все більш актуальною ціллю. А кількісна перевага та мала...
